subject: A humanoid figure raising a heavy electrified machete above their head, shouting, in dark blue lighting
description: A figure in the lower portion of the frame raises a large flat-bladed machete overhead with both hands — or possibly one hand, the grip visible. The blade is rectangular and industrial-looking, with a green-yellow electrical discharge crackling along its surface. A power cable or cord trails from the weapon. The figure is shouting, mouth open wide, expression fierce. They appear to be wearing padded or armored clothing with a chest strap or harness. Hair is pulled back. The scene is lit almost entirely in dark blue with the green electrical glow of the weapon dominating as a light source. The background is indistinct blue shadow.
foreground: Figure raising an electrified flat-bladed machete, shouting, cable trailing from weapon
emotion: fierce defiance — shouting face, weapon raised overhead, body fully committed
